objections.objection_text: I'm 29, living at home, with ruined credit and no money to move out.
objections.underlying_belief: My value and attractiveness as a man are tied to my current financial standing and independent living situation.
objections.underlying_fear: No quality woman will want me, and I am a failure compared to other men.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Seeking God first (Matt 6:33) aligns your character, and the external fruits (finances/relationships) follow as a byproduct of that alignment, not vice versa.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I'm in my parents' extra building right now... who wants to be with a guy that lives at his parents' house, you know?... she ruined my credit, pretty much.
